response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer with a diverse background in multiple programming languages, frameworks, and technologies. While his primary focus has been on JavaScript, TypeScript, and D, he has also worked with Java in various roles, demonstrating proficiency in object-oriented programming. His experience in agile methodologies, cloud technologies, and collaborative project environments aligns well with the job requirements. However, his limited direct experience with Java in recent years and basic German proficiency are minor concerns that warrant discussion during the interview.
strengths: Extensive software development experience across multiple languages and frameworks, including Java in earlier roles
Strong background in agile methodologies, CI/CD, and modern development practices
Proven ability to work in collaborative, client-facing environments and deliver high-quality software solutions
concerns: Limited recent experience with Java (primary focus on JavaScript/TypeScript/Dlang), which is a core requirement for the role
Basic German proficiency may not meet the required 'strong verbal and written communication' standard
Career gap (2025-present) and lack of recent hands-on Java development may raise questions about current readiness for the role
